action.reasoning: Observation: iter13 failed in stage2 with 'element 0 of tensors does not require grad' (no grad_fn on loss) after stage1 reached expected val~0.538; best overall remains 0.5853 from iter11 (val 0.571, few_shot=0.358). Analysis: bug in current (truncated) stage2 code - likely incorrect requires_grad=False (freezing fc too or empty optimizer), model.eval() misuse, or optimizer not targeting fc.params after freeze. cRT 2-stage (Focal/sqrt-s1 + CE/count-s2 on head) + logit-adj(tau=0.75) + RandAug + pretrained ResNet50 is effective and stable (~5min/iter). Decision: rewrite clean complete train.py matching iter11 config exactly (seeds, 60ep s1 Focal+AdamW5e-4+sqrt+cosine, 30ep s2 CE(no smooth)+SGD0.05+mom0.9+nesterov+count on fc-only after proper freeze, best-save by val across stages, metrics.jsonl only, class_counts in ckpt); keep model/predict unchanged (tau=0.75). Run train then submit_eval immediately to recover ~0.58+ bal_acc (follows >20ep rule, fits budgets).
